steps.title: Identify the like terms
steps.content: The terms $6yz^4$ and $2yz^4$ have the same variable part, $yz^4$, so they can be combined. The term $7yz$ is not like them because it does not have $z^4$.

steps.title: Combine coefficients only
steps.content:
Add only the coefficients of the like terms and keep the variable part unchanged.
$$6yz^4+2yz^4=8yz^4$$
So the full expression becomes
$$6yz^4+7yz+2yz^4=8yz^4+7yz$$
The answer is A.
